category_sources: source_facts.description says icbirc is a proxy IRC client and ICB server; official man page describes connecting IRC clients to ICB servers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is icbirc; official homepage/manual at https://www.benzedrine.ch/icbirc.html uses the name icbirc.
docs_sources: Official homepage contains the icbirc manual page and release/source information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage lists source tarballs but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official man page identify IRC-to-ICB proxy/chat protocol functionality.
